item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 110800Z AUTO 18004KT 130V260 9999 ///CB 26/15 Q1015 BECMG NSC
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 110815Z 1108/1206 05003KT CAVOK PROB30 TEMPO 1108/1111 4000 -SHRA SCT100CB PROB30 TEMPO 1116/1120 VRB15G30KT 4000 -TSRA SCT100CB BECMG 1110/1112 11005KT BECMG 1120/1122 04008KT
